workflows.author: ircuitry

workflow.name: Hangman
workflow.description: Play hangman in your channel. Guess letters to reveal the word before the tries run out.
workflow.author: ircuitry

params.code:
import random
words=['banana','python','wizard','guitar','rocket','puzzle','dragon','coffee','jungle','planet','diamond','volcano']
w=random.choice(words)
print(w+'||0@@@🪢 Hangman! '+str(len(w))+' letters: '+' '.join('_' for _ in w)+'  — !guess <letter>')

workflow.name: Trivia
workflow.description: A trivia quiz that asks questions, tracks scores, and crowns a winner.
workflow.author: ircuitry

params.code:
import random
qs=[['What is the capital of France?','paris'],['How many legs does a spider have?','8'],['What gas do plants take in for photosynthesis?','carbon dioxide'],['Chemical symbol for gold?','au'],['Who wrote Romeo and Juliet?','shakespeare'],['Which planet is the Red Planet?','mars'],['How many continents are there?','7'],['What is 9 times 7?','63'],['Largest ocean on Earth?','pacific'],['Year WW2 ended in Europe?','1945']]
q,a=random.choice(qs)
print(q+'@@@'+a)

params.message: ❌ Not quite, {nick}. !trivia for a fresh one.

workflows.name: Werewolf
workflows.description: A social-deduction party game for your channel: villagers hunt the hidden wolves at night.
workflows.author: ircuitry

workflow.name: Werewolf
workflow.description: A social-deduction party game for your channel: villagers hunt the hidden wolves at night.
workflow.author: ircuitry

params.message: 🐺 Werewolf — !wolf join · !wolf start · !wolf myrole (PM me!) · !wolf reveal

params.code:
import os
lst=[x for x in os.environ.get('INPUT','').split(',') if x]
nick=os.environ.get('NICK','')
if nick in lst:
    print(','.join(lst)+'@@@'+nick+' is already in the village ('+str(len(lst))+' players).')
else:
    lst.append(nick)
    print(','.join(lst)+'@@@🏡 '+nick+' joins the village — '+str(len(lst))+' gathered. !wolf start when ready.')

import os,random
lst=[x for x in os.environ.get('INPUT','').split(',') if x]
if len(lst)<4:
    print('@@@🐺 Need at least 4 players ('+str(len(lst))+' so far). !wolf join')
    raise SystemExit
random.shuffle(lst)
roles=dict()
roles[lst[0]]='wolf'
roles[lst[1]]='seer'
for n in lst[2:]:
    roles[n]='villager'
assign=','.join(n+':'+r for n,r in roles.items())
v=sum(1 for r in roles.values() if r=='villager')
print(assign+'@@@🌙 Night falls over the village of '+str(len(lst))+'. Roles dealt in secret — PM me !wolf myrole. (1 werewolf, 1 seer, '+str(v)+' villagers)')

import os
d=dict(x.split(':') for x in os.environ.get('INPUT','').split(',') if ':' in x)
nick=os.environ.get('NICK','')
r=d.get(nick,'')
info=dict(wolf='🐺 You are the WEREWOLF. Each night, secretly choose a victim. Blend in by day!', seer='🔮 You are the SEER. Each night you learn whether one player is a wolf.', villager='🧑 You are a VILLAGER. Find the wolf by day and vote to lynch them.')
if not r:
    print('You are not in this game, '+nick+'. !wolf join then !wolf start.')
else:
    print(info.get(r,'Your role: '+r))

import os
d=[x for x in os.environ.get('INPUT','').split(',') if ':' in x]
if not d:
    print('No game in progress. !wolf start to deal roles.')
else:
    out=[]
    for x in d:
        n,r=x.split(':')
        tag=dict(wolf='🐺 wolf', seer='🔮 seer', villager='🧑 villager').get(r,r)
        out.append(n+' = '+tag)
    print('🔦 Roles revealed — '+' · '.join(out))
